    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>

          <Archive className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
          Arquivado

        <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem checked={shared} onCheckedChange={setShared}>
          <Share2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
          Compartilhado com equipe

      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  )
};
